phases.name: farm_owner_reviewer_and_amendment_intake
phases.outcome: Converted farm-owner critique into a controlled amendment lane; no active baseline edit.

phases.name: farm_practicality_readiness_gate
phases.outcome: Added farm-value/user-burden readiness gates and pilot metrics posture.

phases.name: offline_contractor_late_sync_rehearsal
phases.outcome: Proved offline late-sync pattern with review-required outcome, temporal qualifiers, and stale-output block.

phases.name: storage_lot_dispute_rehearsal
phases.outcome: Exercised harvest intake, drying, storage, split/merge, buyer claim, dispute reconstruction, and negative paths.

phases.name: post_filing_late_evidence_supersession
phases.outcome: Kept original filed/frozen output durable while late evidence creates successor/correction flow.

phases.name: partial_failure_duplicate_sync_stale_state
phases.outcome: Handled interrupted sync, duplicate retry, late evidence, stale state block, and authorized review release.

phases.name: nvz_fertiliser_delayed_lab_recalculation
phases.outcome: Handled estimated versus measured nutrient values, late lab result, recalculation, review, and successor position.

phases.name: vendor_exit_portability_break_test
phases.outcome: Added export/restore, integrity manifest, loss map, sharing-grant separation, and projection-not-truth checks.

phases.name: live_pilot_evidence_intake_protocol
phases.outcome: Prepared real evidence intake, redaction, qualification, reviewer disposition, and metrics protocol.

phases.name: simulated_live_packet_dry_run
phases.outcome: Validated that repository-authored simulated evidence is rejected as non-qualifying.

phases.name: external_pilot_submission_kit
phases.outcome: Prepared external pilot instructions, packet assembly, provenance/custody, preflight, and owner handoff kit.

phases.name: fmis_shadow_import_weak_record_handling
phases.outcome: Imported Codex/FM​​IS findings conservatively: unresolved actors, evidence references, report-mart candidates, loss maps.

phases.name: fmis_shadow_import_adapter_prototype
phases.outcome: Built adapter-style import that emits candidate records, review gaps, and loss maps without governed-state mutation.

phases.name: second_case_adapter_generalization
phases.outcome: Prepared second-case adapter lane and owner extraction requests; no second row-level packet claimed.

phases.name: owner_evidence_dependency_and_predeployment_cutover
phases.outcome: Logged all source-owner blockers and defined predeployment adapter MVP scope; no readiness upgrade.

phases.name: source_owner_evidence_intake
phases.outcome: Needs candidate-003 or candidate-005 packet or explicit source-owner unavailability/refusal.

phases.name: owner_packet_disposition_and_readiness_update
phases.outcome: Needs accepted owner packet disposition; still not live OFARM evidence unless captured by OFARM-compatible runtime.

phases.name: evidence_triggered_amendment_decision
phases.outcome: Only run after accepted owner/live evidence proves a concrete contract gap or promotion basis.
